title: Pods are restarting
description: Kubernetes pods restart according to the restart policy. A restarting container can indicate problems with memory, CPU usage, or an application exiting prematurely. This monitor tracks when pods are restarting multiple times.

definition.message:
{{#is_alert}}

## What's happening?
There has been an increase of more than 5 container restarts in the pod {{pod_name.name}} in the last 5 minutes.

## Related Links

- [Logs](/logs?query=kube_cluster_name:{{kube_cluster_name.name}}+pod_name:{{pod_name.name}})
- [Infrastructure](/infrastructure?filters=kube_cluster_name:{{kube_cluster_name.name}},pod_name:{{pod_name.name}})
- [Metrics Explorer (kubernetes.containers.restarts)](/metric/explorer?exp_metric=kubernetes.containers.restarts&exp_scope=kube_cluster_name:{{kube_cluster_name.name}},pod_name:{{pod_name.name}}&exp_agg=avg&exp_type=line)

{{/is_alert}}
definition.name: [Kubernetes] Monitor Kubernetes Pods Restarting
